title: Appointment
description: Implementation of the 'Appointment' model. Contains information about an appointment.

GenderPreference.description: The prefered gender of the appointment provider. Possible values are: * None * Female * Male

ProviderId.description: If a user has Complementary and Alternative Medicine features enabled, this property indicates the provider assigned to the appointment.

Id.description: The unique ID of the appointment.

Status.description: The status of this appointment. Possible values are: * None * Requested * Booked * Completed * Confirmed * Arrived * NoShow * Cancelled * LateCancelled

StartDateTime.description: The date and time the appointment is to start.

EndDateTime.description: The date and time the appointment is to end.

Notes.description: Any notes associated with the appointment.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

PartnerExternalId.description: Optional external key for api partners.

StaffRequested.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member was requested specifically by the client.

ProgramId.description: The ID of the program to which this appointment belongs.

SessionTypeId.description: The ID of the session type of this appointment.

LocationId.description: The ID of the location where this appointment is to take place.

StaffId.description: The ID of the staff member providing the service for this appointment.

ClientId.description: The RSSID of the client who is booked for this appointment.

FirstAppointment.description: When `true`, indicates that this is the client’s first appointment at this site.

IsWaitlist.description: When `true`, indicates that the client should be added to a specific appointment waiting list. When `false`, the client should not be added to the waiting list. Default: *false*

WaitlistEntryId.description: The unique ID of the appointment waitlist.

ClientServiceId.description: The ID of the pass on the client’s account that is to pay for this appointment.

Resources.description: The resources this appointment is to use.

AddOns.description: Any AddOns associated with the appointment

OnlineDescription.description: Online Description associated with the appointment
OnlineDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.
